title: coryphantha neovivipara var. neomexicana
intro: Coryphantha neovivipara var. neomexicana, also known as New Mexico live cactus, is a rare and endangered species of cactus that belongs to the Echinocereus genus. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Coryphantha neovivipara var. neomexicana include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce pain and inflammation, and prevent infection. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a medical professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
